title: Farwater: Create Basics
description:
Lightweight, in-between season server/pack.
Designed to be a long-lasting alternative to the seasons.
body:
Farwater: Create Basic is a modpack and server on Farwater that was created for the Feedback event and has stayed after it. It is a lightweight create modpack focusing on keeping the vanilla feel of create. We included mods such as Create, Create Add-ons, Farmer's Delight and Handcrafted

For better performance we included mods such as Sodium, Indium and Clumps.
